project_description: Automatic technical report generation from network logs. Pipeline: syslog/NetFlow logs → preprocessing → LLM (Claude) → PDF/Word report. Report templates for NOC, sales, management. Automated email delivery schedule, recipient feedback to improve generated content quality.
client_history: Reports generated manually by analysts — 40h/week savings.
risk_patterns: Prompt engineering for technical reports requires iterations with recipients.
pm_comment: Iterations with report recipients took 6 weeks — but the final result was very good.
